productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Amigo Maroon Casual Shoes
description: When you have the desire to hang out in style, slip into the Amigo mid-ankle casual shoe from buckaroo, and you'll easily be the most stylish person at the gathering! With a smart silhouette and a clean, smooth upper, this pair of lightweight shoes is not just great-looking, but also super comfortable. Pair it with your best pair of jeans and a smart tee to look like a fashionista. Upper Nubuck leather upper for added durability and style Contrast stitch detailing for added attraction Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized Fit Lightly padded collar and tongue for in-step comfort and a snug fit Brand badge on lateral side of foot Midsole EVA midsole with shock absorbers for lightweight comfort Well-cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Fabric lining for extra comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorption Lettering on the outsole in the form of lugs all over the outsole for improved traction shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Do not store in direct sunlight
